# Description
Short description of the issue if needed

## Title
LG-XXX: Short description of ticket in Jira or understandable description (Please add the title to the PR title field!)

> Example: LG-000: Code review standards

Please include a short description of the changes and the related issue.

## Notes
> - Please add the title to the PR title field!
> - Please assign PR yourself!
> - Please add labels to PR

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug Fix
- [ ] Hotfix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Code style update
- [ ] Documentation changes
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)

## How Has This Been Tested?

- [ ] Unit tests to test changes
- [ ] Other variants (Please describe)

## Checklist:

- [ ] Self-review of the code was done!
- [ ] Code follows the style guidelines of this project! [PEP8](https://peps.python.org/pep-0008/) and [Pyspark Style Guide](https://github.com/palantir/pyspark-style-guide)
- [ ] Comments in code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas!
- [ ] Added unit tests that cover a new functionality!
- [ ] Checkstyle and Type Checker passed!
- [ ] Formating and Code coverage were done!
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with changes!
